_doc: Born of the Gods (BNG) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/bng.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 60C / 60U / 35R / 10M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set. US printing sequential collation. 36 packs per box. Basic land sourced from Theros. Marketing/ad cards bear tokens, tips, or emblems but are non-collectible ad cards. AUDIT 2026-06: land-slot outcome re-pointed to set THS — BNG prints no basics; packs used Theros basics (collation-facts).

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
